nasb.text: From there they were removed to Shechem and laid in the tomb which Abraham had purchased for a sum of money from the sons of Hamor in Shechem.

esv.text: and they were carried back to Shechem and laid in the tomb that Abraham had bought for a sum of silver from the sons of Hamor in Shechem.

cnv.text: 運到示劍，埋葬在亞伯拉罕用銀子向哈抹子孫買來的墳地裡。

ccb.text: 后来他们的遗体被带回示剑，安葬在亚伯拉罕买自哈抹子孙的墓地里。

csbs.text: 遗体被带回示剑，安放到亚伯拉罕在示剑用一笔银子从哈莫尔的子孙买来的坟墓里。
